Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: indirectly struck idiophones [300041660], struck idiophones [300041657], idiophones [300041646], sound devices by acoustical characteristics [300041621], sound devices (equipment) [300387677], Sound Devices (hierarchy name) [300041619], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: toys by function [300211292], toys (recreational artifacts) [300211037], recreational artifacts (equipment) [300218781], Recreational Artifacts (hierarchy name) [300136012], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Shaken idiophones made in a variety of forms worldwide, in which one or more objects strike against each other or against the inside or outside of another object.
Idiófonos de agitar construídos en una variedad de formas en todo el mundo, en los cuales uno o más objetos se golpean entre sí o contra el interior o exterior de otro objeto
Geschudde idiofonen, in allerlei vormen; ze worden bespeeld door één of meer voorwerpen te schudden of tegen binnen- of buitenkant van een ander voorwerp te slaan, komen wereldwijd voor.
以搖動發出聲響的體鳴樂器，分布於世界各地，形式包羅萬象，主要將一個以上的物體互相敲擊，或敲擊另一物體內部或外部發聲。

Tlamantli coyolli tlen mohuihuixoa huan mochihchiuhtoc ica miac tlamantli pan nochi tlaltepactli, tlen campa ce zo cequinoc tlamantli motahtacahuia zancehco ica iihtico zo iixco zo iixpan nopa tlamantli.
Schüttelidiofon, weltweit in einer Vielzahl von Formen gefertigt, in dem ein oder mehrere Rasselkörper gegeneinander schlagen oder gegen die Innenwand oder Außenwand eines anderen Gegenstandes.

Source.Source_ID: 2000011401/Diagram Group, Musical Instruments of the World (1976)
2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)
